subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! The entire creation hath been brought forth from nothingness into being for the recognition of God, glorified be His majesty, but in every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم جمیع عالم از برای عرفان حق جل جلاله از عدم بوجود آمده اند ولکن در هر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation
